prompt: 我在 feat/ui-tweak 分支开发到一半，上游 main 更新了。应该 merge 还是 rebase？分别在什么分支做？请给我命令和判断依据。
assertions: Explains that syncing upstream/main belongs on main first, not directly on the feature branch by default.
Explains when rebase main on the feature branch is appropriate for cleaner personal history.
Includes commands for both updating main and updating the feature branch afterward.
